headline: Altria’s Best Growth Opportunity Is Running Into Bureaucratic Foot Dragging
summary: Cigarette volumes in the U.S. keep sliding, yet nicotine pouches are exploding as the fastest-growing segment in oral tobacco. Marlboro cigarette maker Altria Group (NYSE:MO) has poured resources into its on! nicotine pouch brand to offset that decline, but fresh regulatory worries are slowing the very innovation meant to power its future. Is the growth engine ... Altria’s Best Growth Opportunity Is Running Into Bureaucratic Foot Dragging

headline: Shares of tobacco-related companies are trading lower after reports suggesting that the FDA fast-track approval plan for nicotine pouches is being held up by concerns over risks to underage and new users.
summary: Shares of tobacco-related companies are trading lower after reports suggesting that the FDA fast-track approval plan for nicotine pouches is being held up by concerns over risks to underage and new users.
